tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
policies: No refunds after 7 days of purchase
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan
Basic plan supports up to 10 videos per month
AI captions feature is exclusive to the Pro plan

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade anytime from your account dashboard.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: We do not currently offer a free trial, but you can cancel within 7 days for a full refund.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter.
